name: Mogmole
desc: When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon it from your Graveyard in face-up Defense Position. You can only use the effect of "Mogmole" once per Duel.
mnst_eff: When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon it from your Graveyard in face-up Defense Position. You can only use the effect of "Mogmole" once per Duel.
eff: When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon it from your Graveyard in face-up Defense Position. You can only use the effect of "Mogmole" once per Duel.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
